title: Payanangal Thodarudhae Lyrics Orange Mittai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Payanangal Thodarudhae
Singer(s): Justin Prabhakaran, Naresh Iyer & Padmalatha
Lyrics: Kattalai Jaya

Payanangal thodarudhey
nedunchaalaigal neeludhey
varum vazhi marandhidum, paravai naan
iru dhuruvangal inaindhidum valaivum naan

Paalaivanathai kadakirom
solai vandha maghizkirom
edhuvumillai nirandharam
idhuvum kadanthu poividum

Arundhadhi niraimathi
adhokadhi aanadhey
kudai mazhai kadal alai
idaiveli aanadhey

Unadhu varaipadam azhuga neer thuli varayudhey
unadhu pugaipadam enadhu paer solli azhaikudhey
thiriyaal mezhugal aaradhanai vilakettrinom
eriyai vilakaai veenaagi ponomey

Vidai kodu vidai kodu mudivedu pogiren
sari vidu sari vidu vazhi vidu pogiren
unadhu kolusoli tholaivil isai ena ketkiren
unadhu edhorili thirumbum thisaigalil ketkiren
nadhiyai karaiyai theeraamaley kadhai pesinom
kadhaiyin mudivil seraamal ponomey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Payanangal Thodarudhae reflects on the journey of life, emphasizing the importance of memories and experiences.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Orange Mittai, this song underscores the protagonist's introspection and emotional growth throughout the film.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Naresh Iyer and Padmalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Payanangal Thodarudhae was composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Payanangal Thodarudhae, the song encapsulates the reflective journey of life, inviting listeners to ponder their own experiences. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect companion for moments of introspection. As the characters in Orange Mittai navigate their paths, this song serves as a poignant reminder of the beauty in life's fleeting moments. The collaboration of Naresh Iyer and Padmalatha adds depth to the emotional landscape, resonating with anyone who has cherished memories to reflect upon.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Payanangal Thodarudhae from Orange Mittai beautifully captures the essence of life's journey through its soothing melodies. The unique collaboration between Naresh Iyer and Padmalatha, under the masterful direction of Justin Prabhakaran, creates an emotional resonance that lingers long after the song ends. This track is a perfect blend of nostalgia and reflection, making it a must-listen for fans of heartfelt music.
stanzaMeanings: The journeys continue, the long paths will come, forgetting the way, I am the bird that connects the stars and the paths.
We have crossed the obstacles and come to the garden, there is nothing permanent, this too will pass.
The journeys continue, the long paths will come.
The rain of the umbrella is like the ocean waves, it is a joyful sound.
Your arrival is like beautiful drops of water, your entrance makes me cry out your name, we have offered our devotion without any barriers, we have become one with the fire.
The journeys continue, the long paths will come.

Give the farewell, I am leaving, the end is coming, I am going the right way, I am listening to your sweet words, I am hearing your voice in every direction, we are telling stories without reaching the shore of the river, we are leaving without finishing the story.
